summary: Frontend-only testing of new features: Maureen avatar update, MyTimesheets real data from shift_checkins, and Incidents Client/Work toggle. All code implementations verified correct. TypeScript compiles successfully. Build passes. Protected routes correctly redirect to login. Unable to test authenticated UI flows due to no test credentials.

issues: Vite shows @import warnings in logs - fonts loaded via HTML head. Non-blocking.

action_items: Create test credentials file at /app/memory/test_credentials.md for future testing of authenticated features
critical_code_review_comments: Maureen avatar (maureen.png) correctly imported and used in 6 places in AIChatbot.tsx - floating button, chat header, welcome message, user messages, assistant messages, and loading state
MyTimesheets.tsx correctly fetches from 'shift_checkins' table (line 59) with proper date range filtering
MyTimesheets calculates hours using differenceInMinutes from check_in_time to check_out_time
Incidents.tsx has incidentCategory state with 'client' | 'work' toggle (line 195)
Client selector only renders when incidentCategory === 'client' (line 286)
Work Incident clears client_id when selected (line 251)
client_id is set to null for work incidents in mutation (line 211)
Added data-testid attributes to incident category toggle buttons for better testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features verified through code review: 1) Maureen avatar uses maureen.png (1MB file exists), 2) MyTimesheets fetches from shift_checkins table with proper hour calculations, 3) Incidents has Client/Work toggle with conditional client selector. To test authenticated features, test credentials are needed. The app uses Supabase authentication.

details: maureen.png exists at /app/frontend/src/assets/maureen.png (1,062,361 bytes)
AIChatbot.tsx imports maureen.png as maureenImg (line 6)
Image used in 6 locations: floating trigger, chat header, welcome message, user messages, assistant messages, loading state
data-testid attributes present: maureen-chat-trigger, maureen-chat-panel, maureen-chat-close, maureen-chat-input, maureen-chat-send
MyTimesheets.tsx fetches from 'shift_checkins' table (line 59)
Query filters by staff_id and date range (activeRange.start to activeRange.end)
Hours calculated using differenceInMinutes(check_out_time, check_in_time) / 60
Stats computed: totalHours, completedShifts, pendingShifts from real check-in data
Entries formatted with date, client, checkIn, checkOut, hours, status
incidentCategory state with 'client' | 'work' values (line 195)
Two toggle buttons: 'Client Incident' and 'Work Incident' (lines 237-261)
Client selector only shows when incidentCategory === 'client' (line 286)
Work Incident clears client_id when selected (line 251)
Mutation sets client_id to null for work incidents (line 211)
Validation requires client for client incidents only (line 207)
Added data-testid='incident-category-client' and data-testid='incident-category-work'
npx tsc --noEmit completed with exit code 0
yarn build completed successfully in 6.10s
/incidents correctly redirects to /login when not authenticated
/my-timesheets correctly redirects to /login when not authenticated
Login page renders correctly
Email input found (data-testid='login-email-input')
Password input found (data-testid='login-password-input')
Submit button found (data-testid='login-submit-button')
No console errors on page load

feature_verification_summary.maureen_avatar_updated: VERIFIED - maureen.png (1MB) imported and used in AIChatbot.tsx
feature_verification_summary.my_timesheets_real_data: VERIFIED - fetches from shift_checkins table, calculates hours from check-in/out times
feature_verification_summary.incidents_toggle: VERIFIED - Client Incident vs Work Incident toggle implemented with conditional client selector
